Clinical data

There are 3 variables taht were regressed out: gene expression, stage, and age. 

The code looks like this: coxph(Surv(time, status) ~ expr + Stage + tt(rounded_age))
Time and status are the response variables.
expr, stage, and age are the co-variables.
